texto: Body is slave of mind. Mind is regulated by ideas, attitudes, beliefs and tendencies. What really matters is that which set of beliefs get most well entrenched in the mind of a person in the first few decades of his life so as to guide him for the rest of his life as he starts his journey from one end of life to another end of life.
explicacao: Citação de Shri Nagesh sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Body is slave of mind. Mind is regulated by ideas, attitudes, beliefs and tendencies. What really…” articula reflexao, philosophy, psychology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e termino.
